subsystems.name: server
subsystems.responsibilities: Server bootstrap, listen address configuration, and HTTP server lifecycle management

components.name: server
components.responsibility: Server struct with Start() and Shutdown() methods for HTTP server lifecycle

subsystems.name: router
subsystems.responsibilities: Route registration with http.ServeMux and method restriction enforcement

components.name: router
components.responsibility: Router struct for registering health, echo, and not-found handlers on the ServeMux

subsystems.name: handlers
subsystems.responsibilities: HTTP request handlers for health check and echo endpoints with input validation

components.name: health_handler
components.responsibility: HealthHandler implements http.Handler for GET /healthz returning {"status":"ok"}

components.name: echo_handler
components.responsibility: EchoHandler implements http.Handler for POST /api/echo with JSON message validation and echo response

subsystems.name: entry
subsystems.responsibilities: Application entry point: constructs subsystems, registers routes, and starts the HTTP server

components.name: main
components.responsibility: Entry point that wires server, router, and handlers together and starts listening on port 8080
